skinmatics.screen.soon_tips1: Open `%1$s` to open config. Change 'currentSkinmaticsProfile' to change your skinmatics profile.
skinmatics.screen.soon_tips2: Open `%1$s` to begin customizing. Put your textures at `%2$s`
skinmatics.screen.soon_tips3: You can close this to refresh your skinmatics. Refresh your textures to load/reload skinmatics textures.
